{"society_power": 4.5, "state_power": 4.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": -1.0, "key_event": "Bogotazo assassination of Gait\u00e1n triggers La Violencia", "reasoning": "The stalled reform agenda, L\u00f3pez's forced resignation, the 1944 coup attempt, and the post-1946 collapse of the state's monopoly on violence culminating in the Bogotazo eroded state capacity and legitimacy. Society mobilized intensely but through sectarian partisan channels rather than autonomous civic institutions, so its genuine checking power slightly declined despite mass energy."}
